# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Infuse-IoT supports the following versions with security updates:

  - The current `main` branch (targeting the current Zephyr release)
  - The branch targeting the previous Zephyr release

At this time, with the latest release of Zephyr v4.3, the supported branches are:

  - main: (Zephyr v4.3)
  - embeint-v4.2.0 Prior Zephyr release

## Reporting process

Potential security vulnerabilities can be reported through the Github Security page
or emailed directly to <security@embeint.com>.
